name: Altimetrik Corp.
lede: Altimetrik runs six centers across five Indian cities. Bengaluru, Chennai, Pune, Hyderabad and Jaipur, covering R&D, engineering & design and IT, built over 23 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Altimetrik office in India. We map six, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Altimetrik Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Altimetrik runs 6 verified centers across 5 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Chennai, Pune, Hyderabad, Jaipur), covering R&D, engineering & design and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Altimetrik's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Chennai, Pune, Hyderabad and Jaipur, spanning R&D, engineering & design and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 24 decision-makers, in one profile.
